\usepackage{fontspec}
\setmainfont{$if(mainfont)$$mainfont$$else$Noto Serif$endif$}
\setsansfont{$if(sansfont)$$sansfont$$else$Noto Sans$endif$}
\setmonofont{$if(monofont)$$monofont$$else$Noto Sans Mono$endif$}

\usepackage[spanish,es-noquoting]{babel}
\usepackage[margin=1in,headheight=18pt,headsep=20pt,footskip=34pt]{geometry}
\usepackage[table]{xcolor}
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{array}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{longtable}
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\usepackage{titlesec}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage{hyperref}
\usepackage{microtype}

\definecolor{IEHIBlueDeep}{HTML}{0A172A}
\definecolor{IEHIBlue}{HTML}{17608F}
\definecolor{IEHISky}{HTML}{69C9FF}
\definecolor{IEHIGold}{HTML}{E0B55C}
\definecolor{IEHILight}{HTML}{F4F8FC}
\definecolor{IEHIGray}{HTML}{5F6F82}

\hypersetup{
  colorlinks=true,
  linkcolor=IEHIBlue,
  urlcolor=IEHIBlue,
  citecolor=IEHIBlue,
  pdftitle={Código Semilla $version$},
  pdfauthor={Instituto de Expansión Humana Intergaláctica}
}

\setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
\setlength{\parskip}{0.65em}
\setlist{itemsep=0.25em, topsep=0.35em}
\emergencystretch=3em
\hyphenpenalty=8000
\exhyphenpenalty=8000
\sloppy

\titleformat{\section}
  {\Large\bfseries\color{IEHIBlueDeep}}
  {\thesection}{0.7em}{}
  [\vspace{0.15em}{\color{IEHIGold}\titlerule[0.7pt]}]

\titleformat{\subsection}
  {\large\bfseries\color{IEHIBlue}}
  {\thesubsection}{0.7em}{}

\titleformat{\subsubsection}
  {\normalsize\bfseries\color{IEHIBlue}}
  {\thesubsubsection}{0.7em}{}

\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}
\fancyhead[L]{\sffamily\small Instituto de Expansión Humana Intergaláctica · Código Semilla $version$}
\fancyfoot[C]{\sffamily\small Código Semilla $version$ · Página \thepage}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0.4pt}
\renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0.4pt}
\renewcommand{\headrule}{\hbox to\headwidth{\color{IEHISky}\leaders\hrule height \headrulewidth\hfill}}
\renewcommand{\footrule}{\hbox to\headwidth{\color{IEHIGold}\leaders\hrule height \footrulewidth\hfill}}

\providecommand{\tightlist}{%
  \setlength{\itemsep}{0pt}\setlength{\parskip}{0pt}}
\providecommand{\passthrough}[1]{#1}
\providecommand{\pandocbounded}[1]{#1}
